_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Eldeco Ballads of Bliss
project.address: Plot No. GH-1A/2, Sector 22D, Yamuna Expressway, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh 203207
project.description: Exclusive G+32 pre-launch luxury residential development featuring VRF air-conditioning on the booming Yamuna Expressway corridor.
project.long_description: Eldeco Ballads of Bliss is an upcoming flagship luxury residential high-rise project located in the high-growth corridor of Sector 22D, Yamuna Expressway. Spanning a prime 5-acre corner plot, the development comprises only 3 exclusive high-rise towers rising G+32 floors, housing a total of 580 corner-layout units. Structure-designed on a two-side open plot with 120-meter expressway road frontage, every home features spacious 3 BHK and duplex layouts with three open sides for spectacular natural light and cross ventilation. Each apartment is pre-equipped with advanced centralized VRF air conditioning, expansive private balconies connected to every bedroom, and premium wood framing. The central community layout features an elevated luxury clubhouse, adult and kids swimming pools, a jogging path, and 3-tier gated security, positioned just minutes away from the upcoming Noida International Airport.
marketing_claims: Two-Side Open Plot with 120m Road Frontage
Private Balconies attached to Every Bedroom
project.project_risk_flag: Medium: Under construction with expected possession in April 2030.

builder.name: Eldeco Group
builder.company_overview: Eldeco Group has been a leading listed real estate brand in Northern India since 1975. Backed by a 40-year legacy, the builder has successfully delivered over 200 projects, encompassing townships, industrial parks, high-street malls, and luxury high-rises across Lucknow, Kanpur, Agra, Noida, and Greater Noida. Renowned for consistent delivery schedules, robust structural quality, and highly transparent escrow accounts, the group continues to expand its premium portfolios along the Yamuna Expressway.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Comfort
unit_types.subtitle: Compact luxury 3 BHK corner suite
unit_types.description: Modern 3 BHK corner unit featuring central ducted VRF air conditioning, anti-skid ceramic tile balconies attached to every bedroom, modular kitchen setup, and open views of the landscaped central parks.

unit_types.name: Duplex Penthouse
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial rooftop Duplex penthouse
unit_types.description: Ultra luxury G+32 duplex penthouse presenting grand high-ceiling lounge halls, private sky terrace gardens, home automation ready pre-ducting, separate servant suite, and 180-degree unobstructed views of the Yamuna Expressway corridor.

connectivity.notes: On the sanctioned Jewar Airport Aqua extension

connectivity.name: Yamuna Expressway
connectivity.notes: Direct access on the major NCR highway

connectivity.name: Noida International Airport
connectivity.notes: Jewar Airport is a 15-minute signal-free drive

assumptions: GST is 5.0% because project is under construction.
Stamp duty of 6% is as per Uttar Pradesh circle rates.

payment_plan.notes: Offers flexible, stage-wise payments conforming to construction milestones.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Eldeco Ballads of Bliss is the ultimate premium investment-led wealth creator along the Yamuna Expressway airport corridor.
why_buy: Uncompromising Location: Placed directly on the Yamuna Expressway Sector 22D high-growth corridor.
Jewar Airport Proximity: A brief, 15-minute signal-free drive to upcoming Asia's largest airport.
Unbeatable Low Density: Only 3 exclusive high-rise towers spread over 5 acres.
High-end specifications: Central ducted VRF air conditioning and corner layouts.
why_avoid: Under construction: Possession scheduled for April 2030, requiring a solid long-term holding horizon.
Expressway infrastructure is still developing; retail walks require short commutes to central Greater Noida.
decision_profile.best_for: Forward-looking wealth-preservation investors, NRIs, and professionals desiring future-ready airport-adjacent assets.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: End-users needing immediate ready-to-move housing under 3 years.

buyerPersonas.headline: High-Alpha Wealth Play
reasons: Outstanding appreciation prospects driven by upcoming Jewar Airport operations.
Trusted developer with flawless RERA escrows under UPRERAPRJ921261.

riskRadar.description: Early stage construction slabs; possession expected by 2030.

transparency_checks.label: Escrow Account
transparency_checks.details: Fully operational with State Bank of India.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Highest capital appreciation corridor in Delhi NCR driven by Airport & Film City.
investment_insights.rental_desc: High future demand from airport operations personnel and university scholars.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: High demand from global NRI pools guarantees rapid exit options.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Moderate - willing to fund systematic milestones for high-alpha returns
persona_profile.family_stage: High-income global nuclear couples or capital preservers
persona_profile.work_location: Delhi/NCR major commercial nodes and Noida Airport hubs
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirations for rapid long-term capital appreciation, airport-corridor secure ownership, and elite brand prestige.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: The finest upcoming investment play along the Yamuna Expressway. Backed by Eldeco's 40-year legacy, Ballads of Bliss delivers high-end corner-ventilated apartments with ducted VRF AC.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Excellent for end-users seeking a modern, low-density green resort lifestyle, though requires a long, 4-year holding timeline.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: High-alpha growth. Acquiring pre-construction inventory along Sector 22D offers maximum gains as airport operations commence.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Secure and eco-friendly. Safe pedestrian-access design and 80% open layouts provide premium spaces for child play.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Excellent. Highly defensive asset with elite rental demands from aviation, logistics, and data center corporate pools.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Outstanding. Roman neo-classical architectural accents, home automation pre-ducted wiring, and private terraces.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Extremely low builder-bankruptcy risk. Escrow is fully active, with zero historical delivery defaults.
walk_away_conditions: Urgent need to move in under 3 years.
negotiation_leverage: Highlight under-construction timelines to negotiate complimentary covered car parking slots.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Ideal time to book. Secure pre-launch pricing rates before towers casting initiates primary floor rises.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Neoclassical double-height clubhouse lobby; pre-fitted centralized VRF climate control included in base pricing.
competitors.verdict: Choose Eldeco Ballads of Bliss for premium automated luxury and low density; choose ATS Allure for cost-friendly entry.
competitors.price_delta_note: Eldeco Ballads of Bliss is approx ₹1,000/sqft premium to ATS Allure.
